---
title: "Linear Algebra Essentials"
short-title: "Linear Algebra"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Vectors, matrices, eigenvalues, and the linear algebra used throughout this book."
keywords: ["linear algebra", "matrices", "eigenvalues", "vectors"]
---

# Linear Algebra Essentials {#sec-linear-algebra}

::: {.callout-note}
This appendix is under development.
:::
